---
title: "VS Code & Positron Integration"
toc: true
---

`repos` provides two commands for IDE integration — generating a multi-root
workspace file and configuring GitHub Codespaces authentication.  Both work
with [VS Code](https://code.visualstudio.com/),
[Positron](https://positron.posit.co/), and any other IDE that supports the
VS Code workspace format.

## `repos workspace`

Generate (or refresh) the `entire-project.code-workspace` file in your project
directory.  Open it to load all cloned repositories as a multi-root workspace:

```bash
repos workspace
```

Once the file is written, open it in your IDE:

```bash
code entire-project.code-workspace      # VS Code
positron entire-project.code-workspace  # Positron
```

### Options

| Flag | Description |
|---|---|
| `-f <file>` | Use a different list file (default: `repos.list`) |

```bash
# Use a custom list file
repos workspace -f my-repos.list
```

### Repository Layout

The workspace file reflects the repository layout in the parent directory:

```
workspace/
├── my-project/          # your project (contains repos.list)
├── backend/             # cloned from myorg/backend
├── frontend-develop/    # cloned from myorg/frontend@develop
└── docs/                # cloned from myorg/docs
```

---

## `repos codespace`

Inject the `GH_TOKEN` Codespaces secret into every cloned repository that has
a `devcontainer.json`.  `repos codespaces` is an alias for `repos codespace`.

```bash
repos codespace
```

### Options

| Flag | Description |
|---|---|
| `-f <file>` | Use a different list file (default: `repos.list`) |
| `-d <path>` | Path to a `devcontainer.json` file (repeatable) |
| `--permissions <all\|contents>` | Codespaces permission level |
| `-t <tool>` | Force tool used for JSON processing (`jq` or `python`) |

```bash
# Use a custom list file
repos codespace -f my-repos.list

# Specify a devcontainer.json path
repos codespace -d .devcontainer/devcontainer.json

# Multiple devcontainer paths
repos codespace -d path1/devcontainer.json -d path2/devcontainer.json
```

### GitHub Authentication

`repos codespace` requires a GitHub token with Codespaces permissions:

```bash
export GH_TOKEN="your_personal_access_token"
# or
gh auth login
```

---

## R and Python APIs

### R

```r
library(repos)

# Generate VS Code workspace
repos_workspace()
repos_workspace(file = "my-repos.list")

# Configure Codespaces authentication
repos_codespace()
repos_codespace(devcontainer = ".devcontainer/devcontainer.json")
repos_codespace(devcontainer = c("path1/devcontainer.json",
                                 "path2/devcontainer.json"))
```

### Python

```python
from repos import workspace, codespace

# Generate VS Code workspace
workspace()
workspace(file="my-repos.list")

# Configure Codespaces authentication
codespace()
codespace(devcontainer=".devcontainer/devcontainer.json")
codespace(devcontainer=["path1/devcontainer.json",
                        "path2/devcontainer.json"])
```
